overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a hooded character walking along a mountain trail at dusk. The character traverses a natural rocky landscape with sparse vegetation, following a winding dirt path through hilly terrain under a dark blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail between cliff face and scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding mountain path with weapons visible on back

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff wall running parallel to the path on the left side
uneven dirt and gravel trail winding through the terrain
cluster of trees and bushes on the right hillside
sparse vegetation growing on the rocky slopes

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow mountain trail at dusk, with a steep cliff face on the left and scattered trees on the right. The path is uneven and rocky, winding through natural terrain under a darkening sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open hillside trail with grassy slopes

events.description: exits the tree-lined section into a more open hillside area with wider sky visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the landscape opens up into rolling hills

segments.scene_description: The trail opens up into a wider hillside area, losing the tree cover on the right while the cliff face recedes into the distance on the left. The path continues winding through grassy terrain under the dark blue dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky valley path with large boulders ahead

events.description: large rock formation comes into view ahead on the path
distant building or structure becomes visible on the right hillside

agents.ego_description: approaching a rocky outcrop with a distant structure visible ahead on the hillside

entered.detail: prominent rocky outcrop blocking part of the path ahead
small structure visible on the distant right hillside

segments.scene_description: The path enters a more enclosed rocky valley section, with the cliff face drawing close again on the left and a large rock formation appearing ahead. A distant building becomes visible on the right hillside as the character continues toward the rocky outcrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that transitions from a narrow cliffside path into an open hillside before closing into a rocky valley. It begins with the character navigating an uneven, rocky trail flanked by a steep cliff face on the left and scattered trees on the right under a darkening sky. As the path winds forward, the environment opens up into a wider hillside where the tree cover vanishes and the cliff recedes into the distance. The scene then shifts as the trail enters a more enclosed section, with the cliff face drawing close once again and a large rock formation appearing ahead. Finally, the camera tracks toward the rocky outcrop as a distant building becomes visible on the right hillside under the deep blue of dusk.
